topic: position of rational numbers on a number line
latex:
Determine if each statement is \textit{true} or \textit{false}.

\begin{tabular}{|l|c|c|}
\hline
& \textbf{True} & \textbf{False} \\
\hline
$-2\frac{1}{4}$ is to the right of 0 on a number line. & & \\
\hline
$3\frac{1}{3}$ is to the left of 0 on a number line. & & \\
\hline
$-1.75$ is to the left of 0 on a number line. & & \\
\hline
$\frac{1}{2}$ is to the right of 0 on a number line. & & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
